titleStmt.title: SII 40.175: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 175. (A.R. No. B. 310 of 1931.) Oppicherla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying on the road to Durgi about 1(1/2) miles from the village.
This is dated Śaka 1221, Vikāri, Bhādrapada, śu. 2, Friday, corresponding to 1299 A.D., August 29, Saturday.
Damaged. Records the grant of a house, land and garden at Vrappicherla by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kakēta-Gaṇapatīśvararāju to his Purōhita Sarasvati Gōpāla-Bhaṭṭa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubhaśāsana Abhyudaya śakavaru¨rṣaṁbulu 1221 Agunēṭiki vikāri saṁ
vaccara bhādrāpada śu 2 śu nāṁḍu sarasvati śrīn mahāmaṁḍalēśvaraka ketagaṇapatīśvarā
julu pṛthvīrājyaṁ cēyaṁgānu vāri vidvānūlu sarasvadinuṁdēya pādaprakṣādana sēsi yiccina kṣētraṁ
kākeśvara gaṇappasēyudaṁ vanaṁ nūrunēla mayiduru velipolamu
nu reṁḍu lōgiḷlu yiṁttavaṭugrahārāmakṣētrālu Ade yistimi Ī ta¨rvātanu yēlirājulu tāppalēdu rāḍi
tirā gōŪlakūnu brahalaranu strīlanunnu gaṁgaka yi[Uvāṭa] niśahadōṣānapoṁduvārugā
peḍlamu teggina dōṣāna poṁduvāru yī kṣētra na rājulaku baṁ nu bhaṁdōnu mayu
vāraṇāsi pōyi vāraṇāsilōppala U pōvuduru brahmu kētarājuku vidvānulu mu
yīlu Ānu Āṣapaḍi prā mapeddibrāṁhmaṁḍu kauṇḍaṇya gōtrikuḍu brāhmanini rakṣiṁccudamani navadhariṁperi
kākatiyya pṛthivirājyaṁ cēyucu vāraṇāśi viśvēśa pratyakṣa nidhimā
paurōhitulu sarasvati gōpāḷabhaṭlaku pādapraraucana sēsi tama pi
ḷlaku puṇyamugānu vrappiceṟlanu peṭṭina kṣētramaṇuṁgu kharena 15
Ūri paḍumaṭa kha 2 na 10 tū¨rpuna kha caturaśramāmunu tū¨rpunaku dakṣa
ṇaṁ vāṁgu dakṣaṇānaku pedavennapeddava cēnu Ī nairutini mēḍitōṁṭa paḍumaṭiki baddami
ṭṭa Uttarānaku kaḍiyāladrēṁnika na Ūḍpukṣētra karaṇaṁ vāṁgu varikaḍicēnu kaḷaṁ caturaśrayaṁ
muppēraka dakṣaṇanna du¨rppuna guṁḍipeṭṭi vākaḷaṁ paḍamaṭi deḍusapeṭṭi varike kāmunaḍiyakāḷame . doḍḍi reḍḍiku Uttarā
na viya tamuṁdugākunu kāḷamuppeṭu . na 1 = muṁḍlu tōṁṭalūnu . 2 . yi ḍuvvapaṭu
Āsti duḷane ceppināraṁ
Digital edition of SII 40.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
